description: External agent skills installed alongside this repo via scripts/install-all.sh. Not vendored — fetched from upstream (git repos or Xcode toolchain export) at install time.

skills.name: swiftui-expert-skill
skills.role: SwiftUI state, performance, animations, Instruments traces, Liquid Glass

xcode_skills.description: Apple-authored agent skills bundled with Xcode. Installed by scripts/install-all.sh.

primary_source.notes: Exports the latest skills from the active Xcode toolchain. Requires Xcode 26+ with Command Line Tools set to that Xcode.

fallback_source.notes: Community mirror used when export is unavailable (no Xcode, older toolchain, or XCODE_SKILLS_SOURCE=mirror).
